title: Generator Configuration Schema
description: Defines the configuration for generating evaluation examples using language models

ContextType.description:
Types of context for generation:
- text: Plain text context
- code: Programming code context
- conversation: Conversational context
- structured: Structured data context
- mixed: Multiple context types

ContextSource.description:
Sources of generation context:
- custom: User-provided context
- dataset: From a dataset
- api: From an external API
- file: From a file
- generated: Automatically generated

id.description: Unique identifier for this generator configuration

dataset_id.description: Canonical reference to the evaluation dataset this generator is associated with

eval_dataset_id.description: DEPRECATED: use dataset_id instead. Legacy alias for the evaluation dataset identifier.
eval_dataset_id.x-deprecated: Use dataset_id instead. eval_dataset_id will be removed after 2026-Q4.

evaluation_set_id.description: DEPRECATED: use dataset_id instead. Legacy alias for the evaluation dataset identifier.
evaluation_set_id.x-deprecated: Use dataset_id instead. evaluation_set_id will be removed after 2026-Q4.

benchmark_id.description: DEPRECATED: use dataset_id instead. Compatibility alias for the evaluation dataset identifier.
benchmark_id.x-deprecated: Use dataset_id instead. benchmark_id will be removed after 2026-Q4.

model_parameters_id.description: Reference to the model parameters configuration

instructions.description: Detailed instructions guiding the example generation process

context_type.description: Type of context used in generation

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this configuration was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification to this configuration

metadata.description: Additional metadata about the generator configuration

tags.description: Tags for categorizing and filtering configurations
